title: Sit down,plz
description: This can make you sit at anywhere easily!
body:
Would you want to sit anywhere, for fun or taking photos? I do, so I made this.

With this datapack, you can sit anywhere easily.You just need to with nothing in your main hand ,look straight down, then have a sneaking quickly(it means press the shift key and release fastly) and right mouse click.

Or you can do as this after press the F3+B

![Do like this](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e059ddbc46500533346c20324b7cb05a8cc06093.gif)
